markdown:
#  Resource Tracking And Project Financials Setup Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Customize the Budget View (Optional) 
If you want to customize the Procore Labor Productivity Cost budget view, you can click the **Configure Columns** button. This opens the Configure Columns window, which allows you to edit the budget view. To learn about your editing options, see [Configure the Columns for a Budget View](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/project-equipment-user-guide/assign-the-budget-view-to-a-procore-project) in the [Set Up a New Budget View](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/project-equipment-user-guide/assign-the-budget-view-to-a-procore-project) tutorial. When you are finished, click the 'x' in the Configure Columns window to close it.

[ Preview the Budget View ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-project-financials-setup-guide/preview-the-budget-view/)
title: Resource Tracking And Project Financials Setup Guide - Customize the Budget View (Optional)
description: How to set up your project and budget to leverage Procore's unit-based columns and Resource Tracking tools to track real-time labor costs on a project's budget line items. | Customize the Budget View (Optional)
